things.name: Musee de Douala (Doual'Art)
things.description: Contemporary Cameroonian art in the former colonial courthouse

things.name: Marche Central
things.description: Cameroon's biggest market with masks, fabrics, spices and local crafts

things.name: Bonanjo Historic District
things.description: German colonial quarter with the finest 1900-1914 colonial architecture in Central Africa

things.name: Mount Cameroon Hike
things.description: Active volcano 4,095m - highest in West Africa, 3-day climb from Buea

things.name: Wouri Estuary Boat Trip
things.description: Pirogue through the mangroves of the Wouri River delta

things.name: Limbe Wildlife Centre
things.description: Gorilla, chimpanzee and drill rescue centre at Limbe on the coast

things.name: Black Volcanic Beach (Limbe)
things.description: Dramatic black sand beach at the foot of Mount Cameroon

things.name: Bana Village Royal Palace
things.description: Traditional Bamileke chiefly palace with ancestor skull shrines

things.name: Deido Market
things.description: Douala's oldest market with everything from palm wine to carved masks

things.name: Ndole (Bitter Leaf Stew)
things.description: Cameroon's national dish - ndole bitter leaf with bonga fish and groundnuts
